message:
test: add resource/interaction API route tests (bd-2l8q)

Add 12 test files (55 tests) for remaining public API routes:
skills/[id], users/[username], featured, status/incidents,
roadmap/[id], roadmap/[id]/vote, referral/code, referral/stats,
share/mine, share/[code], health/status, reviews/[id]/respond.
